title: Firmographic Enrichment Actor
description: Enriches company firmographic data by inputting website URLs (single or CSV).Extract employee range, revenue, funding stage, founding year, and company status.

websiteUrl.title: Single Website URL
websiteUrl.description: A single company website URL to enrich. Leave empty if uploading a CSV.

csvFileUrl.title: CSV File URL
csvFileUrl.description: URL to a CSV file containing a column named 'website' with company URLs.

csvColumnName.title: CSV Column Name
csvColumnName.description: The column name in your CSV file containing website URLs.

groqApiKey.title: Groq API Key
groqApiKey.description: Your Groq API key. Used for LLM-based firmographic extraction.

groqModel.title: Groq Model
groqModel.description: Groq model to use for extraction. llama-3.1-8b-instant is fastest and free.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrent Requests
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of URLs to process simultaneously. Keep low to avoid API rate limits.

delayBetweenRequestsMs.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequestsMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between SERP API calls to avoid rate limiting.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description: Dataset output is always available. This also saves a CSV file to the key-value store.
